title: Chaziy'el #2381
definition:
Haziel = "vision of God"

 1) a Levite of the family of Shimei of the Gershonites in the time of
    David or Solomon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Haziel = "vision of God"

 1) a Levite of the family of Shimei of the Gershonites in the time of
    David or Solomon

    NASB:  vision of God, a Levite
